item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-22 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] ayghri/i-have-adhd (+1684 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1684，总 stars 7,619，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] deepspeedai/DeepSpeed (+20 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library that makes distributed training and inference easy, efficient, and effective. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +20，前 3 日均值 4，加速度 5x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] tirth8205/code-review-graph (+1561 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1561，总 stars 25,056，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] diegosouzapw/OmniRoute (+2257 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2257，总 stars 24,349，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low
